initial_entry.name: CoNote Git
initial_entry.author: Maximilian Witte
initial_entry.description: Sync individual vault subfolders with collaborators via GitHub — automatic push/pull, no manual commits, with side-by-side conflict resolution. Super simple, full data ownership, completely free. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
